channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Rubbish alongside pathway from Holbrook house back down to bus stop near Eaglesfield, 22nd May
item.description:
Rubbish has been there for months but has got worse recently

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Shooters Hill, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 92-99 St Helena Road, 22nd May
item.description:
We found the household on the main entrance please fix it. It’s distributance to resident.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 41-72, St Helena Road, Rotherhithe, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Broken glass, 22nd May
item.description:
There is broken glass on the side of the road. Most likely from a car accident. It needs clearing.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 58, Westmoreland Road, Shortlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dead fox on porch., 22nd May
item.description:
There is a dead fox in front of next door house (which is empty as in the process of being sold). Could it please be removed?

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Downend, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Kilburn high road to 58 Brondesbury villas both sides covered in rubbish, 22nd May
item.description:
See photos both sides of street

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Brondesbury Villas, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Sewer cover leaking, 22nd May
item.description:
Liquid that smells like sewage is leaking out of a manhole outside clockhouse station

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Beckenham Road, Elmers End, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 3 boys graffiti this yesterday lunch, 22nd May
item.description:
Graffiti on the wall. Video available

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Shortlands, Greater London

item.title: Caravan and van parked on public green space, 22nd May

item.title: Recycle bin not collection not not done, 22nd May
item.description:
Recycle bin not emptied taken out to road to be collected and left
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Oakmere Road, Abbey Wood
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Recycling waste overflowing, 22nd May
item.description:
The recycling bins are padlocked which is causing a pileup of waste. When it’s windy this has been blowing down the street. This has been increasing over two weeks.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Marlborough Avenue, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bin out side school overflowing, 22nd May
item.description:
Waste bin overflowing
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Oakmere Road, Abbey Wood
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Wooden chairs fly tipped today, 22nd May
item.description:
Dumped after mid day

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Wolfe Crescent, Charlton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: A car hit a post with the parking sign, 22nd May
item.description:
A car hit another car then swerved and hit the road sign in the pictures. The sign has been ripped out of the concrete and is now on the side.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Crab Hill, Shortlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large fridge freezer dumped outside Chrisp House, 22nd May
item.description:

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Maze Hill, Greenwich

item.title: Pothole beside railway bridge, 22nd May
item.description:
10cm deep, vertical side, very dangerous for cyclists

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 294, Croxted Road, Dulwich Village, Greater London

item.title: Dumped furniture, 22nd May

item.title: New updates on Traffic control signs missing in Green Lane intersection with William Barefoot Drive causing hazardous safety issues and congestion delays to bus services. State changed to: not TfL’s responsibility TfL, 22nd May
item.description:
New updates on Traffic control signs missing in Green Lane intersection with William Barefoot Drive causing hazardous safety issues and congestion delays to bus services. State changed to: not TfL’s responsibility TfL
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Green Lane, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti, 22nd May
item.description:
Graffiti on the outside building and bin area of small flats on Southport Road

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Southport Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Outside 42 Exeter Road, 22nd May
item.description:
This tree has been overgrown for months now and we have to duck under it every time we walk on the pavement and today I scratched my forehead on a sharp twig while trying to duck. It is not acceptable that this was reported more than a month ago and nothing has been done as it has continued to grow wild across a public footpath.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Mapesbury Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet
